title: cicer incisum
intro: Cicer incisum, also known as the bitter vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe, Asia, and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cicer incisum include relieving digestive problems, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. Cicer incisum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in different ways.
